svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 125px; margin-left: 139px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #232F3E; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
